title: Gramophone/Phonograph Jukebox
description: This pack changes the jukebox in Minecraft to a classic gramophone/phonograph! Made to match with the vanilla feel.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OVclk5ZYHjc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c3fb54af08882a2c3c297a2fa60b361ce05f8ef.png)

This pack changes the jukebox in Minecraft to a classic gramophone/phonograph!

NOW ANIMATED!!!

- Animated horn while playing a disc

- Animated disc while playing a disc

- Animated crank while playing disc

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c3fb54af08882a2c3c297a2fa60b361ce05f8ef.png)

There are two models:

Normal Model - As shown in the previews, having an animated crank at the side.

Shader Model - Does NOT include the animated 'crank' at the side. Instead using a static one, due to custom shader limitations.



Both function the same, just with one only working without shaders. (They both "work", just the normal one bugs out a bit because of block transparency)

Here's a Preview of the animation (Its faster in-game (the crank is around this speed tho)) :
![Preview of the Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5bf26910e29bac50d2cb7be9a286ea18c20ae71.gif)
